title: The magical dimension
description: This mod adds a magical dimension.
body:
# The magical dimension
Did you want to have your own little dimension?
## 📖 What is this mod?
Well, this mod will add it!
To teleport to it, write to the chat "prunus". To teleport back, type "malus" in chat.
There is a large structure in the dimension and dark blue fog everywhere.
## Screenshots
![Structure from the top.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8b26db1eee8d708541b62fd114c68276e304e318.png)
![On the structure](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9177afec2c295fd5e295516cc30edb92b216bb52.png)
![On the structure](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e41ec0be777c6c1325760b7605846813be6877ec.png)
